notes: Works perfectly. Tested around 44% of the main game, at 1024x768 max settings.  Couldn't get the widescreen fix / mod from ps2wide (http://ps2wide.net/pc.html#popst) to work
title: Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time

notes:
Fully completed the game. A frequent issue I had was audio de-syncing in in-game cutscenes, but I believe this affects the Windows version as well. 

Couldn't get my Xbox One controller to work out of the box, had to use AntiMicro (https://github.com/AntiMicro/antimicro). Drawback of this is that camera speed doesn't scale with stick tilt, but its not very noticeable in game.
title: Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time

notes: Runs great, but Nvidia users need to either disable fog or tweak config (https://www.gog.com/forum/prince_of_persia_series/prince_of_persia_sands_of_time_has_been_updated_details_inside_d/post16).
title: Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time

notes: Works fine out of the box on Proton. I installed D9VK and it worked great too, even when testing it with the new ACO compiler.
title: Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time

notes: Works great without needing any tweaks.
title: Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time
